genoprobe

Getting started

  • Installation
  • Quick start

Command reference

  • targets — Define probe-design target regions
  • probes — Generate probe candidates
  • screen — Off-target screening
  • panels — Assemble final probe panels
  • index — Build a Fulgor index

Background

  • Profiles
  • Thermodynamics

Developer reference

  • Python API reference
genoprobe
  • Index

Index

A

  • AnnotationRecord (class in genoprobe.annotation)
  • assemble_panel() (in module genoprobe.panels)

  • basic_tm() (in module genoprobe.thermo)

  • count_mismatches() (in module genoprobe.matching)

D

  • detect_format() (in module genoprobe.annotation)

  • find_hits() (in module genoprobe.matching)

  • min_probe_length (genoprobe.probes.ProbeDesignConfig attribute)
